name: New England Clam Bake (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Build a fire and cover with sandstone rocks (from the beach) or lava rocks.
2. Cover the rocks with seaweed.
3. Place chicken wire over the seaweed.
4. Add more seaweed on top of the chicken wire.
5. Arrange lobsters, potatoes, and herbs (tarragon and chervil) on top.
6. Cover with clams, corn, and shrimp.
7. Finish by covering everything with seaweed.
8. If seaweed becomes dry, moisten it with ocean water before serving.
Serve the clam bake on a large picnic table covered with newspapers. Place a bowl of melted butter and lemon wedges at the center of the table, along with plenty of napkins.
